match.name: 38th Match

gemma_observations: Rahane is prioritizing rotation of strike against Mohsin Khan.
Shami is maintaining a tight line and length to restrict scoring.
Rahane is prioritizing dot balls to build an early foundation.
Angkrish Raghuvanshi is attempting to rotate the strike against Shami.
